title: HexiumMC
description: A modpack for the HexiumMC community servers.
body:
HexiumMC is the official client-side modpack for the Hexium community Minecraft servers, designed to enhance your gameplay without altering the core vanilla experience.

🌟 What This Modpack Adds

This pack focuses on performance, visual enhancements, and quality-of-life improvements while staying fully compatible with our servers.

✔️ Performance Enhancements

- Higher and more stable FPS
- Reduced stuttering
- Faster world and chunk loading

🎨 Visual Improvements

- Cleaner UI elements
- Subtle lighting and animation upgrades
- Improved textures and overall visual clarity

🛠️ Quality-of-Life Features

- Better tooltips and item information
- Optional HUD/minimap improvements (not sure to included)
- Cleaner menus, sorting tools, and general interface polish

🎮 Why Use This Modpack?

1. A consistent, optimized client setup for all Hexium servers
2. Reduced lag and improved stability, even on lower-end systems
3. A more immersive and polished experience while staying 100% vanilla-friendly


✅ 100% Server-Compatible

This modpack is client-side only.
It provides no gameplay advantages and does not modify server mechanics in any way.
